Illia Rudyi
Blog Projects
July 18, 2026

Hi, my name is Illia

Who am I?

I am a Senior Frontend Engineer with 5 years of experience.

I liked computers from a young age, I was fascinated by how they worked and how they could be used to solve problems. I was never scared to go inside the hardware and take a closer look at what was going on.

At some point in life, I was deciding to go to Frontend or Backend Development, and I chose the Frontend path. I learned the basics of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript and started building my first web applications. Then I heard about ReactJS at this talk by Sanya Solovyov, and I decided to take a look.

Long story short: I started my career as an intern at Zaelab in e-commerce practice, in a group that was working with an e-commerce technology called VTEX. I was learning and working with ReactJS and VTEX. That was a chance to learn and work with a modern frontend framework.

After that, I was moved to the group working on the Threekit platform, integrating the Threekit platform with the React application and powering them with Logik.io technology.

And for this time I am working on this type of project, building composable UIs not only with Threekit, but with kBridge as 3d/2d renderer and Paradigm as a back-office technology.

Throughout the time, I built a lot of templates and internal tools to speed up and simplify the development process for the team.
